title: mentha libenensis
intro: Mentha libenensis, also known as East African mint, is a species of mint native to East Africa. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which contain menthone and menthol, providing pain-relieving and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Mentha libenensis include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and combat respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to soothe skin irritations and promote overall well-being.
